title: neoregelia tristis
intro: Neoregelia tristis, also known as the Purple Vase Plant, is a species of flowering plant in the bromeliad family, characterized by its vibrant purple flowers and long-lasting blooms. Traditionally, Neoregelia tristis has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Neoregelia tristis are believed to include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Neoregelia tristis is typically prepared for herbal use through infusions, tinctures, or decoctions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
